yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_July_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for July 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 622 Vulnerabilities Including Two Exp"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-20"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: WordPress Exploitation Underway (CVE-2026-63030), (Mon, Jul "; content:"CVE-2026-63030"; nocase; sid:9697154; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
